    • Constructor Detail

      • LoanCalculator

        public LoanCalculator​()

    • Method Detail

      • main

        public static void main​(String[] args)

      • start

        public void start​(Stage loanCalcStage)
        Specified by:
        start in class Application
        Parameters:
        loanCalcStage - Provides the overridden start method with a stage class. The loanCalcStage will be used to set title to the stage, create a loan calculator module, and once the application is run, show the module to the user.

      • createLoanCalcModule

        public void createLoanCalcModule​(Stage loanCalc)
        Parameters:
        loanCalc - loanCalc will be used to set the scene on the stage.

      • gridLayout

        public GridPane gridLayout​(Label airLabel,
                           TextField airText,
                           Label numYearsLabel,
                           TextField numYearsText,
                           Label loanAmtLabel,
                           TextField loanAmtText,
                           Label monthlyPmtLabel,
                           TextField monthlyPmtText,
                           Label totalPmtLabel,
                           TextField totalPmtText,
                           Button calcButton)
        Parameters:
        airLabel - Label for the annual interest rate.
        airText - Text field to capture the user entered annual interest rate.
        numYearsLabel - Label for the number of years
        numYearsText - Text field to capture the user entered number of years for payment calculation.
        loanAmtLabel - Label for loan amount.
        loanAmtText - Text field to capture the user entered loan amount.
        monthlyPmtLabel - Label for monthly payment.
        monthlyPmtText - Text field to show the calculated monthly payment of the loan.
        totalPmtLabel - Label for total payment.
        totalPmtText - Text field to show the calculated total payment of the loan.
        calcButton - Button to execute the monthly and total loan payment.
        Returns:
        gridPane Returns the grid pane with alignment, padding, gaps, and nodes with its specified positions.

      • monthlyPmtCalc

        public String monthlyPmtCalc​(TextField airText,
                             TextField loanAmtText,
                             TextField numYearsText)
        Parameters:
        airText - Text field to capture the user entered annual interest rate.
        loanAmtText - Text field to capture the user entered loan amount.
        numYearsText - Text field to capture the user entered number of years for payment calculation.
        Returns:
        monthlyPmt Calculated monthly payment amount of the loan of type string.
